title: insight recurrence
summary: The development thread focuses on insight-recurrence, identifying recurring event-shape patterns across multiple PRs. Pattern 1, Bundle-as-shape, highlights bundling of multiple concerns in six PRs across five arcs. Pattern 2, Supersession-acknowledgement, describes a scenario where a later PR supersedes an earlier one, with acknowledgment at different time grains and registers. The outcomes include a structured understanding of recurring patterns and their relationships in project management.
